description: All features to_do, no dependencies — should suggest critical priority first

vision_doc.visionStatement: A web app that lets users track their Ethereum transactions in real time.
vision_doc.targetUser: Crypto investors who want to monitor their wallet activity.
vision_doc.problemStatement: Developers lose track of wallet transactions and have no easy way to visualize them.
vision_doc.successCriteria: User can enter a wallet address and see a list of recent transactions.

backlog.name: Set up Development Environment
backlog.description: Install necessary tools and configure the project structure.

backlog.name: Fetch Transaction Data
backlog.description: Call the Etherscan API to retrieve transactions for a given address.

backlog.name: Display Transactions
backlog.description: Render the fetched transactions in a readable table in the UI.

reason: F001 is critical priority and all others depend on it

description: F001 complete — F002 dependency now met, should suggest F002

backlog.name: ML-based Transaction Anomaly Detection
backlog.description: Train a model to detect unusual transaction patterns using scikit-learn.
backlog.scopeFlagReason: Flagged during scoping — ML training is out of scope for a simple tracker and conflicts with the no-paid-APIs constraint. Developer chose to keep it.
